title: Beautiful Women
content:
Women sit, or move to and fro--some old, some young;
The young are beautiful--but the old are more beautiful than the young.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walt Whitman, titled "Beautiful Women", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
